Attributes.Name: OpenUrl
Attributes.Description: Opens a URL using the browser specified in the 'Browser' test configuration parameter (both mobile and desktop values are valid).

Attributes.Name: Url
Attributes.Description: The URL to open. If the value of the 'Browser' test configuration parameter is unknown or empty, the default desktop browser opens.

Attributes.Name: UseActiveTab
Attributes.Description: If set to 'True', opens URL in the active tab of an open browser, if one is available, or a new window, if a browser is not open. If set to 'False' or empty, always opens URL in a new window. No effect with WebDriver.

Attributes.Name: BrowserArguments
Attributes.Description: Lists all the arguments used to start your browser.

Attributes.Name: Argument
Attributes.Description: Enter command-line arguments to start your browser. If you have multiple arguments, separate them in different TestStepValues. Note that arguments vary for each browser.
